message:
Running command: 
MCU_DIR="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu"
CONFIG_FILE="$MCU_DIR/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/config.json"

# Update config.json:
# - Add mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_chip.v and padframe.v to VERILOG_FILES
# - Skip core.v (duplicate module name: defines mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper same as wrapper.v)
python3 << 'PYEOF'
import json

CONFIG_FILE = "/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/config.json"
MCU_DIR = "/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu"

# Read config
with open(CONFIG_FILE) as f:
    d = json.load(f)

vfiles = d.get('VERILOG_FILES', [])
current_set = set(vfiles)

# Files to add (in verilog/rtl/ but not in VERILOG_FILES)
# - Skip core.v: defines the SAME module as mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper.v (duplicate)
# - Add mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_chip.v
# - Add padframe.v (needed for chip.v to resolve mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_padframe)

new_files = [
    f"{MCU_DIR}/verilog/rtl/padframe.v",
    f"{MCU_DIR}/verilog/rtl/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_chip.v",
]

added = []
for f in new_files:
    if f not in current_set:
        vfiles.append(f)
        added.append(f)
        print(f"Added: {f}")

d['VERILOG_FILES'] = vfiles

# Write back
with open(CONFIG_FILE, 'w') as f:
    json.dump(d, f, indent=4)

print(f"\nTotal VERILOG_FILES: {len(vfiles)}")
print(f"Added {len(added)} files")
print("\nNote: core.v EXCLUDED - it defines 'module mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper'")
print("      which conflicts with mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper.v (duplicate module)")
PYEOF
